texto: The flowered trim on the hems [of the dress] seemed superfluous, even frivolous, but at the same time it comforted her, as though the idea that a seamstress had thought to adorn clothing so innocently implied that somewhere, innocence was safe.
explicacao: Citação de Gaèl Baudino sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The flowered trim on the hems [of the dress] seemed superfluous, even frivolous, but at the same …” articula tempo, innocence, safety em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como safety.
